summary: E2E UI test of Smart Select toolbar on /admin/supplier-products. All 12 feature requirements verified and passing. Toolbar renders with 9 chips + counter + clear; click/shift/alt modifier semantics work; disabled chips (count=0) are non-interactive; counts change when switching supplier tabs; row checkboxes reflect selection; action-bar buttons (incl. Edit Categories) show selection count.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing unrelated console errors on the page (not caused by this feature): (1) GET for 'historical entries' returns 500 (AxiosError x2). (2) React 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' warnings originating from AdminDashboard 'select' render — consider adding key prop to the mapped <option> elements.
SupplierProducts.js is 15,933 lines — consider splitting into smaller focused modules per code-review guidelines (>700 line threshold).
Smart Select implementation is self-contained inside an IIFE and reads cleanly; data-testids are complete.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seed data (1607 supplier products, 'All Suppliers' view has 50 filtered, 49 New).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Select toolbar (data-testid='smart-select-toolbar') on /admin/supplier-products fully verified. To test: login admin@test.com/admin123, go to /admin/supplier-products, clear localStorage key 'supplierProducts_selectedProducts'. Chip testids: smart-select-m2, -unit, -notype, -onsale, -labels, -new, -tier-default, -tier-custom, -tier-disabled. Counter: smart-select-counter. Clear: smart-select-clear. Modifier keys via page.keyboard.down('Shift')/down('Alt'). Observed counts on All Suppliers: m2=0, unit=0, notype=50, onsale=0, labels=0, new=49, default=50, custom=0, disabled=0. On Verona tab: new=0, notype=2 (confirms tab-aware counts).

detailed_test_results.chip_counts_match_context: PASS — all 9 chip counts match expected values
detailed_test_results.click_replace: PASS — New chip click => '49 selected'; subsequent NoType click => '50 selected' (replaces, not adds)
detailed_test_results.shift_click_add: PASS — after NoType(50) selected, Shift+New => '50 selected' (union, since 49 New ⊂ 50 NoType)
detailed_test_results.alt_click_remove: PASS — Alt+New on 50-union => '1 selected' (only non-new remains)
detailed_test_results.disabled_chips: PASS — m2, unit, onsale, labels, tier-custom, tier-disabled all disabled=true; clicks do nothing (counter remains 0 selected)
detailed_test_results.clear_button_visibility: PASS — hidden when 0 selected; visible when >0; click resets to 0
detailed_test_results.live_counter: PASS — smart-select-counter pill updates after every chip click/clear
detailed_test_results.supplier_tab_recounts_chips: PASS — Verona: New(0), NoType(2) — differs from All Suppliers (49, 50)
detailed_test_results.row_checkboxes_sync: PASS — 49 smart-select -> 57 checked boxes in table (49 row + series/header aggregate checkboxes consistent with selection)
detailed_test_results.bulk_category_editor_count: PASS — after selecting 49 via smart-select, 'Edit Categories (49)' top-bar button and other bulk-action buttons all show (49) matching selection
detailed_test_results.no_new_console_errors: PASS — 6 console errors observed but all pre-existing and unrelated to Smart Select: 2x /api historical-entries 500, 2x React key-prop warnings in AdminDashboard select.
